$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/docs/changelog.text:
! 2026.06.09

* Fixed server status probe using static mirror origin instead of configured server origin — switching the database mirror dropdown no longer incorrectly marks the feature server as unavailable
* Added search box to Uninstall tab for quickly finding installed plugins, themes, and languages
* Fixed concurrent deployment failures in GitHub Actions by adding concurrency control to `gh-pages.yml`

! 2026.06.08

* Mirror toolbar layout: status indicators (✓ Static Database, ⚠ Server Unavailable) now display inline with labels; flex-wrap prevents overflow on narrow viewports
* Fixed update list not rendering: replaced `compare:integer:gt[0]` (returns count value, not boolean) with `search[0]then[no]else[yes]` pattern
* Fixed auto-fetch on update tab switch: BackgroundAction `track-filter` now uses `prefix[...]` match to handle `$tabs` macro hash suffixes
* Fixed "查看" button in update notification: removed redundant `cpl-get-plugins-index` call; now navigates directly to update tab and clears notification
* New setting: "Auto-confirm installation during updates" — skips confirmation dialog when enabled (default: off)
* Action buttons consolidation: refresh/update-all buttons moved from global action bar to update-manager sub-tab for better context
* Fixed `getCurrentMirrorApiBase` returning server origin instead of mirror origin for static API calls
* Build status badge auto-clears when switching to a static mirror
* Homepage sorting: removed random shuffle filter — homepage now sorts plugins by download count (stable order, no flickering)
* New `sortbycount` filter operator: sorts plugin tiddlers by download count from cached stats JSON, falls back to alphabetical order when offline
* Download stats in-memory cache: download counts loaded once on cold start, incremented on each download — zero file I/O on API calls
* Optimized `/cpl/stats` API: new `?top=N` parameter for top-N plugins by downloads; response no longer includes `downloadsByIp` (IP history)
* Batched stats fetch: background action requests `?top=200` to reduce payload size instead of fetching all plugins

! 2026.06.07

* Comments Center: submit, view, and reply to comments via GitHub OAuth login; admins can moderate pending comments (approve/reject/delete)
* OAuth security: cryptographically random nonce for state parameter validation to prevent CSRF attacks
* Split static mirror and feature server: database mirror (static) and feature server can now be configured independently
* Batch download stats: multiple plugin stats merged into a single HTTP request with 100ms debounce, dramatically reducing page load requests
* Declarative Wikitext migration: replaced 5 JS fetch handlers with TW native `tm-http-request` + BackgroundAction pattern, reducing ~170 lines of frontend JavaScript
* Removed plugin detail view: clicking plugins now navigates directly to the plugin's own tiddler, eliminating persistent tag nesting bugs and 268 lines of dead code
* Fixed critical CSS bug: empty `.cpl-status-banner` rule caused browsers to discard all subsequent styles, breaking gradients, buttons, and most visual styles
* Fixed `plugin-item` macro navigating to page title instead of `cpl.title`, affecting home gallery and author plugin lists
* Fixed 15+ filter syntax errors (missing/extra `]`) in comments and stats views, eliminating "Filter error: Missing [ in filter expression"
* Fixed build status polling failing for static mirror due to missing mirror type detection
* Optimized default image loading speed
* Improved login error display: explicit error message on 401 instead of perpetual Loading spinner, auto-refresh comments center after login

! 2026.06.01

* Server mirror fallback: iframe bridge timeout now falls back to direct HTTP fetch for static files on server-type mirrors instead of blocking the UI
* Reduced iframe bridge timeout from 15s to 8s for less perceived lag
* Dropdown no longer disabled during data loading — users can switch mirrors anytime
* CPL Server now serves `/repo/` static library route with CORS headers for direct plugin database JSON access
* New setting: "Auto-check for updates when entering CPL layout" (default: off)
* Fixed mirror source being unexpectedly switched when entering CPL layout

! 2026.05.30

* Fixed `plugin.info` `list` field: corrected Settings tab path to `views/system/settings` so it displays in the plugin info panel
* Fixed `readonly-api.ts` metadata: added `platforms: node` to prevent `require("url")` module-not-found errors in browser builds
* Docker deployment support:
  ** `docker-compose.yml` template
  ** `Dockerfile` with read-only mode baked in (`IfEditorMode=no`)
  ** `.dockerignore` / `.gitignore` excluding runtime cache directories

<$list filter="[<chinese>match[yes]]">

> 好用到哭，装就完了!

!! 欢迎使用 CPL!

使用 TW 这么久，你还在为四处寻觅好用的插件而发愁吗？还在为管理一大堆插件的更新、处理插件的依赖而苦恼吗？你还在为查找插件的用法而翻遍全网吗？你是否希望安装一个插件的某个历史版本，而非最新版本？

如果你是插件的作者，你是否还在苦恼如何推广自己的插件，如何让用户及时获得最新的版本呢？

你是否希望 TW 能像其他现代笔记软件一样，能够一键管理所有插件，能够更傻瓜化地查找和安装插件，甚至主动为你推广插件。是否希望 TW 能够帮助你自动保持插件的最新？

这一切，在 CPL 得以实现！

---

CPL 是由[[太微(TiddlyWiki)中文社区|https://github.com/tiddly-gittly]]维护的、致力于搜集网络上所有与 <$text text={{{ TiddlyWiki5 }}}/> 有关插件的、希望为中国以及全世界的太微用户提供一键安装、更新插件体验的插件聚合中心。

本插件有如下特点：

* 聚合各种 TW 插件并保持最新当前 500+;
* 在你的 Wiki 中搜索各种插件，提供关键词、分类和标签搜索;
* 自动检查插件更新;
* 安装插件时可自动递归安装依赖，并可以指定所有插件的安装版本;

</$list>

<$list filter="[<chinese>match[no]]">

> Just install it! I think you need it.

!! Welcome to CPL!

After using TW for so long, are you still worried about looking around for good plugins? Are you still struggling to manage a bunch of plugin updates and deal with plugin dependencies? Are you still searching the web to find out how to use a plugin? Do you want to install some historical version of a plugin instead of the latest version?

If you are a plugin author, do you still struggle with how to promote your plugin and how to keep users up to date with the latest version?

Do you wish TW could manage all your plugins with one click like other modern note-taking software, make it more foolproof to find and install plugins, and even proactively promote plugins for you? Do you want TW to help you keep your plugins up-to-date automatically?

It's all here at CPL!

---

This plugin source is maintained by the [[TiddlyWiki Chinese Community|https://github.com/tiddly-gittly]] and is dedicated to collecting all <$text text={{{ TiddlyWiki5 }}}/> related plugins on the web, hoping to provide a one-click installation and update plugin experience for TW users all around the world.

This plugin has the following features:

* Aggregate various TW plugins and keep them up-to-date with the current 500+;.
* Search for various plugins in your Wiki, providing keyword, category and tag search;.
* Check for plugin updates automatically;
* Install plugins with automatic recursive installation of dependencies, and you can specify the installed version of all plugins;

</$list>

</$list>

在该页面内您可以对 CPL 插件的行为进行设定。

; CPL 数据库镜像入口 <$select tiddler="$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/config/current-static-repo" field="text">
<$list filter="[{$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/config/static-repos}enlist-input[]]" variable="repo">
<option value=<<repo>>><$text text=<<repo>>/></option>
</$list>
</$select>

; CPL 服务器功能源 <$select tiddler="$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/config/current-server-repo" field="text">
<$list filter="[{$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/config/server-repos}enlist-input[]]" variable="repo">
<option value=<<repo>>><$text text=<<repo>>/></option>
</$list>
</$select>

<<<
当 CPL 获取插件数据库经常失败时，你可以尝试切换静态数据库镜像；评论、评分、统计和登录等功能由服务器功能源提供。

欢迎各位大佬部署国内镜像，详情请咨询QQ交流群或在[[GitHub Issue|https://github.com/tiddly-gittly/TiddlyWiki-CPL/issues]]提问

你可以手动更改数据库镜像入口：[[$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/config/current-static-repo]]

你也可以单独更改 CPL 服务器功能源：[[$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/config/current-server-repo]]
<<<

; 自动更新检查间隔 <$edit-text tiddler="$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/config/auto-update-intervals-minutes" tag="input" default="-1" /> (分钟/次)

<<<
自动更新检查会在 Wiki 刚打开时进行，并每隔指定间隔进行一次检查

显然自动检查需要联网，每次所消耗的流量很小，大概10KB。如果发现有插件可以更新，会在 CPL 面板顶部提醒。

当值小于等于0，则关闭自动更新，也包括刚打开 Wiki 的那一次。

关闭后可以手动在 [[$:/ControlPanel]] 的 [CPL] 中进行检查。
<<<

<$checkbox
  tiddler="$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/config/auto-load-database-in-cpl-layout"
  field="text"
  checked="yes"
  unchecked="no"
  default="yes">
  进入 CPL 布局时自动加载数据库
</$checkbox>

; <$checkbox
  tiddler="$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/config/auto-check-updates-in-cpl-layout"
  field="text"
  checked="yes"
  unchecked="no"
  default="no">
  进入 CPL 布局时自动检查更新
</$checkbox>

; <$checkbox
  tiddler="$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/config/auto-confirm-install"
  field="text"
  checked="yes"
  unchecked="no"
  default="no">
  更新时自动确认安装（跳过确认弹框）
</$checkbox>

; 插件更新筛选器 <$edit-text tiddler="$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/config/update-filter" tag="input" default="" />

<<<
插件更新是有选择的，你可以通过修改筛选器来排除一些插件。
<<<

</$list>

<$list filter="[<chinese>match[no]]">

In this page you can set the behavior of the CPL plugin.

; CPL Database Mirror Entry <$select tiddler="$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/config/current-static-repo" field="text">
<$list filter="[{$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/config/static-repos}enlist-input[]]" variable="repo">
<option value=<<repo>>><$text text=<<repo>>/></option>
</$list>
</$select>

; CPL Feature Server <$select tiddler="$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/config/current-server-repo" field="text">
<$list filter="[{$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/config/server-repos}enlist-input[]]" variable="repo">
<option value=<<repo>>><$text text=<<repo>>/></option>
</$list>
</$select>

<<<
When CPL often fails to fetch the plugin database, you can switch the static database mirror. Comments, ratings, stats, and login are provided by the feature server.

If you'd like to deploy your own mirrors, feel free to ask questions in the [[GitHub Issue|https://github.com/tiddly-gittly/TiddlyWiki-CPL/issues]]!

You can manually change the database mirror entry: [[$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/config/current-static-repo]]

You can also configure the CPL feature server independently: [[$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/config/current-server-repo]]
<<<

; Automatic update of check intervals <$edit-text tiddler="$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/config/auto-update-intervals-minutes" tag="input" default="-1" /> (minute(s) per time)

<<<
The automatic update check is performed when the Wiki is first opened, and at specified intervals

Obviously auto-checking requires an internet connection and consumes very little traffic each time, about 10KB. If a plugin is found to be updatable, the CPL panel will show a notice at the top.

When the value is less than or equal to 0, auto-update is turned off, also when the Wiki is just opened.

After closing it can be checked manually in [CPL] of [[$:/ControlPanel]].
<<<

<$checkbox
  tiddler="$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/config/auto-load-database-in-cpl-layout"
  field="text"
  checked="yes"
  unchecked="no"
  default="yes">
  Automatically load the database when entering the CPL layout
</$checkbox>

; <$checkbox
  tiddler="$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/config/auto-check-updates-in-cpl-layout"
  field="text"
  checked="yes"
  unchecked="no"
  default="no">
  Automatically check for updates when entering the CPL layout
</$checkbox>

; <$checkbox
  tiddler="$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/config/auto-confirm-install"
  field="text"
  checked="yes"
  unchecked="no"
  default="no">
  Auto-confirm installation during updates (skip confirmation dialog)
</$checkbox>

; Plugin Update Filter <$edit-text tiddler="$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/config/update-filter" tag="input" default="" />

<<<
Plugin updates are selective and you can exclude some plugins by modifying the filter.
